tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input:
{"command": "# Check the original run (182127) which should have turn 1
RUN1="run_20260407_182127"
echo "=== $RUN1 ==="
ls /tmp/claude_captures/$RUN1/ | grep "_summary.txt$" | grep -v response | sed 's/_[0-9]*.*//' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
echo ""
# Check all runs from today's multi-turn test
for run in run_20260407_182127 run_20260407_185256; do
    echo "=== $run ==="
    ls /tmp/claude_captures/$run/ | grep "_summary.txt$" | grep -v response | wc -l
    echo "iterations"
done", "description": "Check which runs have the multi-turn data"}
